_description: Recalibrated scoring based on winner/loser analysis of BULL_CALL_SPREAD outcomes. Key changes vs v1: hv_30d inverted (higher HV = better for spreads), sma200_pct weighted more heavily, volume_ratio rewarded, above_sma50 neutralized, rsi adjusted to favor lower values.

_analysis.hv_30d: Winners avg 32.6% vs losers 29.3% — higher HV means more movement potential. INVERTED vs v1.
_analysis.sma200_pct: Winners avg +8.93% vs losers +5.37% — stronger uptrend = better outcome.
_analysis.nearest_support_pct: Winners avg 4.91% vs losers 4.14% — slightly closer to support is better.
_analysis.trend_25d_pct: Winners avg +2.88% vs losers +2.30% — momentum matters.
_analysis.volume_ratio: Winners avg 104.5 vs losers 99.1 — higher volume confirms movement.
_analysis.rsi: Winners avg 52.16 vs losers 52.89 — slight inverse, lower RSI has more upside room.
_analysis.above_sma50: Winners 0.592 vs losers 0.594 — essentially no predictive value. Neutralized.
_analysis.above_sma200: Winners 0.648 vs losers 0.626 — small positive signal, kept but low weight.
_analysis.sma50_pct: Winners +2.39% vs losers +1.79% — price above SMA50 by more = better.
_analysis.nearest_resistance_pct: Low predictive value. Kept as mild penalizer only.

_score_max_note: Sum of all max positive scores = 14

trend_25d_pct._note: % price change over last 25 days. Momentum matters for spreads.

above_sma50._note: Neutralized — essentially no predictive value for BULL_CALL_SPREAD.

above_sma200._note: Small positive signal kept. Winners 0.648 vs losers 0.626.

sma50_direction._note: Direction still relevant as trend confirmation.

rsi._note: Lower RSI = more upside room. Winners avg 52.16 vs losers 52.89. Adjusted thresholds.

week_52_position._note: Low predictive value. Neutralized — no positive or negative scores.

nearest_support_pct._note: Winners slightly closer to support. Kept but modest weight.

nearest_resistance_pct._note: Low predictive value. Mild penalizer only for very tight resistance.

candlestick_signal._note: Very low predictive value (avg +0.03 in v1). Kept but minimal weight.

hv_30d._note: INVERTED vs v1. Winners avg 32.6% vs losers 29.3%. Higher HV = more movement potential for spreads.

volume_ratio._note: Higher volume confirms momentum. Winners avg 104.5 vs losers 99.1.
